features.description: User can create an order with at least one item
acceptance_criteria: Order appears in database with PENDING status
Validation returns 400 for empty items list

features.description: User can list their orders with pagination
acceptance_criteria: Only orders for authenticated user are returned

features.description: User can cancel a pending order
Workflow engine for order state management (Issue #73)
acceptance_criteria: State machine with 9 states (PENDING through REFUNDED)
REST API endpoints for all state transitions
features.notes: Complete - Java uses Spring StateMachine, Python uses transitions library. See docs/WORKFLOW_ENGINE_GUIDE.md

features.description: Batch job status tracking for scheduled jobs
acceptance_criteria: Status enum: SCHEDULED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED
features.notes: Complete - See issues #96-#99. Domain layer, JPA repository, service, Spring Batch tasklet, Quartz job, REST API all implemented.

acceptance_criteria: Domain layer has no Spring/JPA annotations
Application layer has no HTTP framework imports
Unit tests for all use cases
